examples.description: right knee pain after sports injury, condensed

transcript.text: Hi, what brings you in today?
I've had pain in my right knee for about a year, ever since I twisted it playing soccer.
It bothers me with walking and especially with sports.
Let me have a look. There's a small effusion. Tenderness along the medial joint line on the right.
AP and lateral views of the right knee show medial joint space narrowing.

claims.source_quote: I've had pain in my right knee for about a year

claims.text: Patient reports onset approximately one year ago, attributed to twisting the right knee playing soccer.
claims.source_quote: ever since I twisted it playing soccer

claims.text: Patient reports symptoms with walking and worsening with sports.
claims.source_quote: It bothers me with walking and especially with sports.

claims.text: Physician noted small effusion on the right knee.
Physician noted tenderness along the medial joint line on the right.
claims.source_quote: Tenderness along the medial joint line on the right.

claims.text: Physician described AP and lateral views of the right knee showing medial joint space narrowing.
claims.source_quote: AP and lateral views of the right knee show medial joint space narrowing.

examples.description: left knee instability — special test, 0-5 strength, ROM in degrees, MRI, stated diagnosis + plan

transcript.text: What's been going on with the knee?
My left knee keeps giving out, especially going down stairs.
On exam, Lachman is negative on the left. Quadriceps strength is four out of five. Knee flexion to 110 degrees, full extension.
The MRI of the left knee shows a partial tear of the ACL.
My working diagnosis is a partial ACL tear on the left.
We'll start with physiotherapy and a hinged knee brace, and follow up in six weeks.

claims.source_quote: My left knee keeps giving out

claims.text: Patient reports the left knee gives way, especially when descending stairs.
claims.source_quote: keeps giving out, especially going down stairs

claims.text: Physician noted Lachman test negative on the left.
claims.source_quote: Lachman is negative on the left
Quadriceps strength is four out of five

claims.text: Physician noted left knee flexion to 110 degrees with full extension.
claims.source_quote: Knee flexion to 110 degrees, full extension

claims.text: Physician described MRI of the left knee showing a partial tear of the ACL.
claims.source_quote: The MRI of the left knee shows a partial tear of the ACL.

claims.text: Physician stated a working diagnosis of partial ACL tear on the left.
claims.source_quote: My working diagnosis is a partial ACL tear on the left.

claims.text: Physician stated a plan to begin physiotherapy and a hinged knee brace, with follow-up in six weeks.
